framework.name: Replacement Card Spending Inheritance
framework.description: Spending limits persist across card replacements through a replacement_for chain, ensuring limits follow the cardholder relationship rather than physical card instances. Prevents circumvention through card reissuance.
framework.raw_quote: A card's spending limits apply across any cards it replaces (that is, its replacement_for card and that card's replacement_for card, and so on).
